## Analyzers (1)

### Hunterio_DomainSearch `v1.0`
hunter.io is a service to find email addresses from a domain.

- **Author:** Rémi Allain, Cyberprotect
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `fqdn`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Hunterio/Hunterio_domainsearch.json)
